ground_truth_answer: Table 2 compares nDCG@10 scores for naive chunking vs late chunking across BeIR datasets.

ground_truth_answer: A chunking strategy that applies the transformer to the whole text first and then mean-pools over token ranges to produce contextual chunk embeddings.
Michael Günther, Isabelle Mohr, Daniel James Williams, Bo Wang, Han Xiao
